name: Mango Ice Cream
recipeInstructions: This is a great dessert which can be made with very little effort. You can replace the mango pulp with any other pureed fruit. It is easy to describe quantities as one can. The mango pulp can is about 6 inches high and 3 inches in diameter, while the condensed milk can is about 3 inches high and 2.5 inches in diameter. Mix all of the ingredients in a bowl and put it in the freezer for about 8 hours before serving.
